name: debug-and-fix
description: Drop your repo, get working code back. Automated debug-and-fix pipeline: scan codebase, run tests, parse errors, analyze root cause, generate minimal fixes, verify with tests, report before/after.

steps.name: scan
steps.description: Detect language, framework, test runner, dependencies, and project structure.

steps.name: test-before
steps.description: Run the test suite to capture baseline state (before).

steps.name: parse-errors
steps.description: Parse error messages, stack traces, and test output into structured data.

steps.name: root-cause
steps.description: Analyze parsed errors to identify root cause, affected files, and fix hints.

steps.name: generate-fix
steps.description: Generate minimal code fixes as unified diffs, ordered by confidence.

steps.name: apply-and-verify
steps.description: Apply fix, re-run tests, verify improvement. Rollback if no improvement. Retry up to max_attempts.

steps.name: report
steps.description: Generate before/after comparison table, diffs, confidence scores, and human-readable summary.
